bqm_url_hint: Paste the ThinkBroadband CSV Yesterday share link for daily collection. CSV Live is for live spot checks only. DOCSight fetches once immediately after setup, then daily at the configured time. PNG links are supported only for legacy image mode.
bqm_bulk_import_hint: For history, use the CSV bulk import to load up to 12 months of history before relying on daily collection.
bqm_no_data: No BQM graph for this date.
bqm_setup_intro: BQM by ThinkBroadband monitors your connection quality by pinging your public IP from external servers. DOCSight can display BQM graphs alongside your modem data for a complete picture.
bqm_setup_benefit_1: Independent proof of connection issues (not just modem-side)
bqm_setup_benefit_2: Tracks latency, packet loss, and throughput 24/7
bqm_setup_benefit_3: Strengthens ISP complaints with third-party evidence
bqm_setup_step_1: Set up DynDNS on your router (e.g. MyFRITZ! on Fritz!Box) so BQM can find your IP
bqm_setup_step_2: Enable WAN ping/ICMP on your router so it responds to external pings (Fritz!Box: Internet → Permit Access → tick "Respond to ping")
bqm_setup_step_3: Go to thinkbroadband.com/broadband/monitoring, create a free account, and register your DynDNS address
bqm_setup_step_4: Once monitoring is active, copy the CSV Yesterday Share URL and paste it in DOCSight Settings → BQM Share URL. CSV Live is only for spot checks.
bqm_no_data_range: No BQM data in this range
bqm_import_drop: Drag & drop images here or click to select
bqm_collect_time_hint: Time of day to fetch CSV Yesterday data (configured timezone). Missed days are not backfilled automatically; import historical CSV files when a longer gap exists.
bqm_monitor_id_help: Enter the numeric ThinkBroadband monitor ID from your dashboard URL.
bqm_no_csv_data: No CSV data for this date.
bqm_csv_dates_only: This range only has PNG fallback data.
bqm_setup_guided_intro: Link an existing ThinkBroadband Broadband Quality Monitor so DOCSight can show latency and packet loss beside modem evidence.
bqm_setup_requirement_monitor: A ThinkBroadband CSV Yesterday share URL
bqm_setup_requirement_static_ip: A stable public IP or DDNS target monitored by BQM
bqm_setup_configure_text: Create or open your BQM monitor, copy the CSV Yesterday share URL, then save it in Settings. CSV Live is for spot checks only.
bqm_setup_validate_text: After saving a CSV Yesterday URL, DOCSight performs one initial fetch. Use CSV bulk import for up to 12 months of history or longer gaps.
